message.msgTxt: '{"term":"Spring 2025","total":7,"overdue":4,"upcoming":3,"deadlines":[{"id":"DL-001","title":"Spring 2025 Add/Drop Deadline","date":"2025-01-24","category":"Enrollment","status":"Overdue","daysPast":41,"impact":"Students cannot add/drop without late fee and registrar override."},{"id":"DL-002","title":"FERPA Annual Training - Faculty","date":"2025-02-01","category":"Compliance","status":"Overdue","daysPast":33,"impact":"12 faculty members have not completed required FERPA training."},{"id":"DL-003","title":"Withdrawal Deadline (W Grade)","date":"2025-03-14","category":"Enrollment","status":"Upcoming","daysUntil":6,"impact":"Students withdrawing after this date receive WF grade affecting GPA."},{"id":"DL-004","title":"Graduation Application Deadline","date":"2025-02-15","category":"Graduation","status":"Overdue","daysPast":19,"impact":"3 seniors have not submitted graduation applications."},{"id":"DL-005","title":"Spring Grade Submission Deadline","date":"2025-05-15","category":"Grading","status":"Upcoming","daysUntil":67,"impact":"Faculty must submit all grades within 72 hours of final exam."},{"id":"DL-006","title":"Summer 2025 Registration Opens","date":"2025-03-10","category":"Registration","status":"Upcoming","daysUntil":2,"impact":"Current students with priority registration may register starting March 10."},{"id":"DL-007","title":"Financial Aid Enrollment Certification","date":"2025-01-20","category":"Financial Aid","status":"Overdue","daysPast":45,"impact":"7 students enrolled but not certified - aid disbursement at risk."}]}'
